mechanics.excerpt: EQUIPMENT Demolltlon Kit: The demolition kit contained in a air- tight case and provides engineer everything to set off a explosion except the explosives themselves The includes enough detonators, blasting cord wire timers and other triggering mechanisms t0 set dozen simple timed fused explosions or three complex booby traps c8 Blasting Block: C8 the explosive of choice through- out the Inner Sphere, even though it is expensive and hard to come by: C8 plastique, meaning i5 pliable and can be molded into any shape ad affixed t0 almost any surface, It is aiso very stable and can be dropped, even set on fire , witn- out lear 0f exploding It requires special detonator; Satchel Charge: This is essentially bag that contains the equivalent four blocks of C8 and timer, commonly set for 15 seconds Infantry units use satchel charges to cripple vehi: cles and BattleMechs to create new doorways into punker Or tor dozens other Durooses The charge must be physically placed the target, however.
